desc: Exports the latest QA clash results as a single self-contained HTML file with embedded screenshots.
summary: Exports the latest QA clash results as a single self-contained HTML file with embedded screenshots. Printable to PDF via any browser. Saved under .mepbridge/qa/exports/clash_report_{timestamp}.html.

preprompts: Building HTML clash report with embedded images…
thinkingsteps: Embedding screenshots as base64 data URIs…
successprompts: HTML clash report written to {path} ({rows} rows, {images} embedded images).
